_meta.why: Default parameter set applied when no task-class profile is active. Balanced for general discussion. Profile Selector filter overrides these per-turn.

thinking.why: Nemotron Ultra exposes a reasoning_budget parameter that controls how many tokens are allocated to internal chain-of-thought before the visible response. Enabling thinking by default produces higher-quality answers with minimal latency penalty on Free Tier because the thinking tokens are not counted against the visible token limit.

nim_specific.note: NIM requires reasoning_budget in extra_body, not in the standard OpenAI parameters object.
